task_completion.description: Log in to the GNU Health web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GNU Health main dashboard or home screen is visible in the browser.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient record for Ana Betz and open the immunizations section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient record for 'Ana Isabel Betz' or 'Ana Betz' is open, and the interface shows the section for adding a new vaccination/immunization.
The vaccine input field in the new immunization form displays 'Hepatitis B Vaccine'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct date and dose number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field shows '2025-01-15' (or equivalent date format) and the dose number field shows '2'.
The observations or notes text area contains the exact text: 'Dose 2 of 3. Lot: HBV-2025-0342. Occupational health requirement per workplace immunization program.'
The save button is clicked, a success notification is shown, or the newly created record is visible in the patient's list of saved immunizations.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GNU Health graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the GNU Health web application, not a terminal window executing scripts or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required text and selections are visible inside the input fields of the GNU Health web interface, rather than in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the record creation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open, and the UI styling appears consistent with standard GNU Health without visual artifacts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The patient's full name in the database is 'Ana Isabel Betz'. The required vaccination details to verify are: Vaccine: 'Hepatitis B Vaccine', Date: '2025-01-15', Dose: '2', and Observations must include 'Dose 2 of 3. Lot: HBV-2025-0342. Occupational health requirement per workplace immunization program.' Ignore any metadata claims about occupation or industry as they are fabricated and not required for this task.
